differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome (secondary to Membranous Nephropathy or other glomerulopathy)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Quantification of proteinuria with 24-hour urine collection or spot protein-to-creatinine ratio
Kidney biopsy with Congo red staining and electron microscopy
Echocardiogram with strain imaging to assess for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Bone marrow biopsy for plasma cell dyscrasia evaluation
Consideration of cardiac MRI for tissue characterization

differential_diagnoses: Monoclonal Gammopathy of Renal Significance (MGRS)-associated glomerulonephritis (e.g., proliferative GN with monoclonal immunoglobulin deposits)
Nephrotic syndrome secondary to Membranous Nephropathy
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) with comorbid chronic kidney disease
next_steps: Quantification of proteinuria with 24-hour urine collection or spot protein-to-creatinine ratio
Kidney biopsy with immunofluorescence, Congo red staining, and electron microscopy
Echocardiogram with global longitudinal strain (GLS) analysis to evaluate for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Abdominal fat pad fine-needle aspiration for Congo red staining
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate with flow cytometry and cytogenetics
Cardiac MRI with late gadolinium enhancement
Measurement of serum C3 and C4 levels
